title: Broad → Specific Ordering
description: The doc must move from the broad picture to specifics: motivation/overview first, then mechanism, then fine detail. It must not open with a narrow detail before the big picture is set.
criterion: Early slides establish the 'what/why' at a high level; detail deepens as the doc progresses.

rubric.3: Mostly ordered, one slide out of place.
rubric.1: Opens on a narrow detail, or detail precedes the overview.

cases.rationale: Opens on a narrow formula before defining TCP — inverted order.
